raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The T.A.M.P.O.N. Act mandates the removal of toxic chemicals from menstrual products.",
    "Long-term exposure to PFAS through intimate use is dangerous.",
    "The legislation aims to protect Californians from health effects linked to PFAS.",
    "The Department of Toxic Substances Control will establish regulations to enforce the ban on PFAS by January 1, 2029.",
    "A list of accepted testing methods for identifying PFAS in menstrual products will be published by January 1, 2027.",
    "The bill requires manufacturers to certify compliance with new standards by registering with the Department of Toxic Substances Control by July 1, 2029.",
    "The Department of Toxic Substances Control will evaluate alternatives to PFAS to prevent replacing one harmful chemical with another.",
    "PFAS are known as 'forever chemicals' due to their resistance to degradation.",
    "Scientific research has linked PFAS to severe health problems, including cancers, hormone disruption, and immune system disruption.",
    "The T.A.M.P.O.N. Act Fund will collect penalties from violations to support enforcement of the legislation."
  ]
}
```
